message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

class Player
class Piece
class King
class Queen
class Bishop
class Knight
class Rook
class Pawn

King -|> Piece
Queen -|> Piece
Bishop -|> Piece
Knight -|> Piece
Rook -|> Piece
Pawn -|> Piece

Player "1" o-- "16" Piece
Player "1" o-- "1" King
Player "1" o-- "1" Queen
Player "1" o-- "2" Bishop
Player "1" o-- "2" Knight
Player "1" o-- "2" Rook
Player "1" o-- "8" Pawn
@enduml
